title: fix(deps): update module github.com/containers/common to v0.56.0
body:
[![Mend Renovate](https://app.renovatebot.com/images/banner.svg)](https://renovatebot.com)

This PR contains the following updates:

| Package | Type | Update | Change |
|---|---|---|---|
| [github.com/containers/common](https://togithub.com/containers/common) | require | minor | `v0.55.4` -> `v0.56.0` |

---

### Release Notes

<details>
<summary>containers/common (github.com/containers/common)</summary>

### [`v0.56.0`](https://togithub.com/containers/common/releases/tag/v0.56.0)

[Compare Source](https://togithub.com/containers/common/compare/v0.55.4...v0.56.0)

#### What's Changed

-   Bump to v0.55.0 by [@​rhatdan](https://togithub.com/rhatdan) in [https://github.com/containers/common/pull/1536](https://togithub.com/containers/common/pull/1536)
-   Update module github.com/containers/image/v5 to v5.26.1 by [@​renovate](https://togithub.com/renovate) in [https://github.com/containers/common/pull/1540](https://togithub.com/containers/common/pull/1540)
-   After secret --replace, make sure old ID is deleted by [@​rhatdan](https://togithub.com/rhatdan) in [https://github.com/containers/common/pull/1537](https://togithub.com/containers/common/pull/1537)
-   Update module github.com/opencontainers/image-spec to v1.1.0-rc4 by [@​renovate](https://togithub.com/renovate) in [https://github.com/containers/common/pull/1542](https://togithub.com/containers/common/pull/1542)

-   fix(deps): update module golang.org/x/sys to v0.10.0 by [@​renovate](https://togithub.com/renovate) in [https://github.com/containers/common/pull/1544](https://togithub.com/containers/common/pull/1544)

-   pkg/ssh: simplify ssh.Validate by [@​dfr](https://togithub.com/dfr) in [https://github.com/containers/common/pull/1554](https://togithub.com/containers/common/pull/1554)

comments.body: For the record, I have filed https://github.com/containers/common/issues/1654 .
